---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a change to existing behavior
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the concrete problem or limitation you are running into. Feature
requests with a clear problem statement move faster than ones that lead
with a proposed solution.

## Who runs into this problem

Is this specific to a deployment context (Kubefence, nono-proxy, CLI)?
A compliance framework (CRA, DORA, EU AI Act)? A particular agent type?
The more specific, the easier it is to evaluate priority.

## Proposed behavior

Describe what you would like to see. If you have a specific API or config
shape in mind, sketch it out. If you are not sure what the right interface
is, say so.

## Alternatives considered

What workarounds are you using now? Are there other approaches that would
solve the same problem?

## Willingness to contribute

If you are able to implement this, say so here. If you need someone else
to build it, that is fine too.

---

Not sure if this is a bug, a feature, or a documentation gap? Ask in
[Discord](https://discord.gg/3v2DduCsd) before filing.
